decision: Implement in releasable phases: release integrity, local security/durability, audit contracts, then optional LangGraph runtime. Preserve the lightweight baseline package and all existing user-owned/untracked files.

notes: 18 files and 150 tests passed with loopback permission; sandbox-only EPERM reproduced without it.

decision: Release, Studio, install, and audit contracts are hardened and focused tests pass.
risk: The new orchestration runtime expands dependency and execution surface; keep it optional and fail closed.
evidence: npx vitest run focused suites: 66 audit/CLI/readiness tests and 52 Studio tests passed

decision: Ship executable orchestration as a separate optional package, compile validated roster workflows to checkpointed LangGraph nodes, and preserve the root kit as the policy and evidence plane.
risk: Optional runtime dependencies and host-capable tools increase supply-chain and execution risk; the baseline remains runtime-free and every mutation stays bounded by config, approval, worktree, and Docker policy.

decision: Review credential references, localhost APIs, outbound network policy, MCP allowlists, path boundaries, process cancellation, sandboxing, and release provenance.
risk: Provider and host integrations remain security-sensitive and require explicit operator configuration.

decision: Security boundaries accepted with regression coverage for CSRF, redirects, private networks, secret redaction, traversal, cancellation, Docker controls, and package-source scanning.
risk: Live provider credentials and external MCP systems remain operator-owned integration risk.

decision: Behavioral, coverage, smoke, package, SBOM, and responsive browser evidence satisfy the implementation gate.
risk: Registry publication and Trusted Publisher configuration still require live workflow verification.

decision: Root/template docs, schemas, adapters, release runbooks, roadmap, changelog, and package guides reflect the optional runtime and two-package release.
risk: A partial npm publication must not create a GitHub release.

notes: 194 tests passed; 80.04% statements, 66.78% branches, 84.43% functions, and 83.77% lines.
Runs view verified at 1440x900 and 390x844 with no overlap or overflow; mobile controls precede canvas; disabled and empty states are explicit.

evidence: Audit v2, manifest v2, coverage gate, package smokes, SBOMs, and browser QA.
Root and installed-template living docs updated.
UPGRADE.md and hash-aware manifest v2 update tests.
PUBLISH.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, SUPPLY_CHAIN.md, and two-package release workflow.

notes: Full local release gate passed after example refresh, including coverage, build, package/adapters, examples, clean install, Studio/setup/audit smokes, dependency audit, SBOM, and both pack dry-runs.
